_description: Ground-truth entity resolution key for the ShopFlow dataset. Every alias listed below appears somewhere in the 15 Jira tickets and/or the 5 Markdown docs and should resolve to the canonical entity it is nested under. Use this to score precision/recall of your GraphRAG entity resolution.
_tricky_cases: 'auth-layer' is overloaded: it is the canonical REPOSITORY name in the docs but is used as a SERVICE alias for AuthLayer in INC-4481. Context disambiguation required.
'payments' could be misread as a generic noun rather than the PaymentService alias; it appears as a component/service reference.
The same pull request (#847) is referenced via three different repo aliases, so PR resolution depends on first resolving the repo aliases.
Several reporters are system accounts (e.g. 'datadog-alerts', 'pg-monitor', 'edge-gw-alerts') and should NOT be resolved to human entities.
